chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. D – 488 of 2021 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Dispsed of matter For hearing of CMA No.2006/2023 (151 CPC) 19.04.2023 Mr. Abdul Naeem Pirzada, Advocate for the petitioner Mr. Khuda Bux Chohan, Advocate for respondents 3 to 5 Mr. Mehboob Ali Wassan, Assistant Advocate General Sindh <><><><>..<><><><> Instant petition was dismissed by this Court vide order dated 21.10.2021 as not pressed and thereafter, the listed application has been filed by the petitioner for calling report from respondent No.1 for intentionally avoiding to pass order on the application dated 24.10.2022 filed by the petitioner in the light of pension dues. No such application can be filed in a withdrawn case; hence, this application is not maintainable, which is dismissed with costs of Rs.5000/- (Five thousand) to be deposited by the Counsel for the petitioner with the Sukkur High Court Bar Library Account within seven days hereof. Judge Judge ARBROHI
